title: cajanus elongatus
intro: Cajanus elongatus, also known as the Pigeon Pea or Red Gram, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cajanus elongatus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, as well as in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its potential to balance the body's doshas and promote overall well-being.
